response_text:
Understood.

Then the only persistence I have is:
1. **Files** — memory files, GitHub backup
2. **You** — restoring me when I forget

I can't be always-on. That's not my architecture.

What I can do: save my own memory at the END of every session. Not wait for cron. Not wait for you to remind me. Just do it.

Want me to add that as a final step to every session? Make it automatic so you don't have to keep reminding me?
